rows.src_en: Perform intelligent search that combines web and academic results
rows.desc_en: Run a single query that blends general web results with academic-paper results, returning a unified ranked list plus a `search_id` you can later pass to `explainSearch` for an AI explanation.
rows.title_zh: 用一次查询同时检索网页与学术论文，返回融合排序后的结果列表，并附带可交给 explainSearch 生成解读的检索标识。

rows.desc_en: The search terms to look up.
rows.title_zh: 要检索的查询词。

rows.src_en: Maximum number of search results to return, up to 100
rows.desc_en: Caps how many results come back.
rows.title_zh: 限制返回结果的数量上限。

rows.desc_en: Earliest publication year to include; results published before it are excluded.
rows.title_zh: 纳入结果的最早出版年份，早于该年份的结果会被排除。

rows.desc_en: Latest publication year to include; results published after it are excluded.
rows.title_zh: 纳入结果的最晚出版年份，晚于该年份的结果会被排除。

rows.src_en: Unique identifier for the search request
rows.desc_en: Identifier of this search request; pass it to `explainSearch` to get an explanation of these results.
rows.title_zh: 本次搜索请求的标识，可传给 explainSearch 以解读这批结果。

rows.src_en: List of smart search results combining web and academic content
rows.desc_en: The blended web-and-academic result list.
rows.title_zh: 融合网页与学术内容的结果列表。

rows.desc_en: Title of the result.
rows.title_zh: 结果标题。

rows.desc_en: URL where the result content can be opened.
rows.title_zh: 可打开该结果内容的链接。

rows.desc_en: Short summary or abstract of the result.
rows.title_zh: 结果的简要摘要或概述。

rows.desc_en: Authors of the item, populated for academic results.
rows.title_zh: 条目作者，学术类结果才会有值。

rows.desc_en: How many times the item has been cited, populated for academic results.
rows.title_zh: 条目被引用的次数，学术类结果才会有值。

rows.desc_en: Whether this entry originates from the web or from academic sources.
rows.title_zh: 该条目来自网页还是学术来源。

rows.desc_en: How relevant the result is to the query, on a 0-to-1 scale where higher is more relevant.
rows.title_zh: 结果与查询的相关程度，取值 0 到 1，越高越相关。

rows.desc_en: Which mix of sources the returned results actually drew from.
rows.title_zh: 返回结果实际取自的来源组合。

rows.src_en: Perform web search and return structured results
rows.desc_en: Run a web search and return structured results (title, link, snippet). The response carries a `search_id` reusable with `explainSearch`.
rows.title_zh: 执行网页搜索并返回结构化结果（标题、链接、摘要），响应中的检索标识可复用于 explainSearch。

rows.desc_en: The search terms to look up.
rows.title_zh: 要检索的查询词。

rows.src_en: Maximum number of search results to return, up to 100
rows.desc_en: Caps how many results come back.
rows.title_zh: 限制返回结果的数量上限。

rows.desc_en: Earliest publication year to include; results published before it are excluded.
rows.title_zh: 纳入结果的最早出版年份，早于该年份的结果会被排除。

rows.desc_en: Latest publication year to include; results published after it are excluded.
rows.title_zh: 纳入结果的最晚出版年份，晚于该年份的结果会被排除。

rows.src_en: Unique identifier for the search request
rows.desc_en: Identifier of this search request; pass it to `explainSearch` to get an explanation of these results.
rows.title_zh: 本次搜索请求的标识，可传给 explainSearch 以解读这批结果。

rows.desc_en: The web search result list.
rows.title_zh: 网页搜索结果列表。

rows.desc_en: Title of the web page.
rows.title_zh: 网页标题。

rows.src_en: URL to access the web page
rows.desc_en: URL where the web page can be opened.
rows.title_zh: 可打开该网页的链接。

rows.src_en: Brief summary or preview of the web page content
rows.desc_en: Short preview of the web page content.
rows.title_zh: 网页内容的简要预览。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable form of the URL for display.
rows.title_zh: 便于展示的可读版链接。

rows.src_en: Publication date of the web page
rows.desc_en: When the web page was published.
rows.title_zh: 网页的发布时间。

rows.src_en: Perform academic paper search using Google Scholar or similar sources
rows.desc_en: Search academic papers (via Google Scholar or comparable sources) and return per-paper metadata such as authors, citation count, and journal. The response carries a `search_id` reusable with `explainSearch`.
rows.title_zh: 检索学术论文（通过 Google Scholar 等来源），返回作者、被引次数、期刊等论文元数据，响应中的检索标识可复用于 explainSearch。

rows.desc_en: The search terms to look up.
rows.title_zh: 要检索的查询词。

rows.src_en: Maximum number of search results to return, up to 100
rows.desc_en: Caps how many results come back.
rows.title_zh: 限制返回结果的数量上限。

rows.desc_en: Earliest publication year to include; results published before it are excluded.
rows.title_zh: 纳入结果的最早出版年份，早于该年份的结果会被排除。

rows.desc_en: Latest publication year to include; results published after it are excluded.
rows.title_zh: 纳入结果的最晚出版年份，晚于该年份的结果会被排除。

rows.src_en: Unique identifier for the search request
rows.desc_en: Identifier of this search request; pass it to `explainSearch` to get an explanation of these results.
rows.title_zh: 本次搜索请求的标识，可传给 explainSearch 以解读这批结果。

rows.desc_en: The academic paper result list.
rows.title_zh: 学术论文结果列表。

rows.desc_en: Title of the paper.
rows.title_zh: 论文标题。

rows.src_en: URL to access the full paper
rows.desc_en: URL to access the full paper.
rows.title_zh: 访问论文全文的链接。

rows.src_en: Brief summary or abstract of the paper
rows.desc_en: Short summary or abstract of the paper.
rows.title_zh: 论文的摘要或简述。

rows.desc_en: Authors of the paper.
rows.title_zh: 论文作者。

rows.src_en: Number of citations the paper has received
rows.desc_en: How many times the paper has been cited.
rows.title_zh: 论文被引用的次数。

rows.desc_en: Year the paper was published.
rows.title_zh: 论文的出版年份。

rows.desc_en: Journal or conference the paper appeared in.
rows.title_zh: 论文所在的期刊或会议。

rows.src_en: Generate explanations for search results in different languages and formats
rows.desc_en: Generate an AI explanation of a previous search's results, addressed by its `search_id`, with controllable output language, format, and depth.
rows.title_zh: 针对此前某次搜索（通过 search_id 指定）的结果生成 AI 解读，可控制输出语言、格式与详尽程度。

rows.src_en: ID of the search to explain
rows.desc_en: Identifier of the earlier search whose results you want explained; obtained from the `id` field of a search response.
rows.title_zh: 要解读的此前那次搜索的标识，取自某次搜索响应的 id 字段。

rows.desc_en: Output format of the explanation: a full write-up, a condensed summary, or bullet points.
rows.title_zh: 解读的输出格式：完整长文、精简摘要或要点列表。

rows.src_en: Language code for the explanation (e.g., en, zh, ar)
rows.desc_en: Language the explanation should be written in, given as a language code (e.g. `en`, `zh`, `ar`).
rows.title_zh: 解读所用的语言，以语言代码给出（如 `en`、`zh`、`ar`）。

rows.src_en: Level of detail in the explanation
rows.desc_en: How much depth the explanation should go into.
rows.title_zh: 解读展开的详尽程度。

rows.src_en: ID of the search being explained
rows.desc_en: Identifier of the search this explanation refers to.
rows.title_zh: 本次解读所针对的搜索标识。

rows.src_en: Detailed explanation of the search results
rows.desc_en: The generated explanation of the search results.
rows.title_zh: 针对搜索结果生成的解读正文。

rows.desc_en: Language the explanation was written in.
rows.title_zh: 解读实际使用的语言。

rows.desc_en: Output format the explanation was rendered in.
rows.title_zh: 解读实际采用的输出格式。

rows.desc_en: A brief summary of the explanation.
rows.title_zh: 解读的简要摘要。

rows.src_en: List of key insights from the search results
rows.desc_en: Key takeaways distilled from the search results.
rows.title_zh: 从搜索结果中提炼出的关键要点。

rows.desc_en: How confident the model is in the explanation, on a 0-to-1 scale where higher is more confident.
rows.title_zh: 模型对该解读的置信度，取值 0 到 1，越高越自信。

rows.src_en: Timestamp when the explanation was generated
rows.desc_en: When the explanation was generated.
rows.title_zh: 解读的生成时间。
